prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild tavern corner, Ren Brightford (androgynous crafter, rolled-sleeve apron, brass tool belt, ash-marked gloves) and Ren Dawncrest (androgynous mage, layered blue robes, floating spell tags) investigating a table corner. Ren Brightford leans in to inspect metallic residue with a magnifying glass while Ren Dawncrest stands beside them, fingers tracing the air to stabilize a flickering mana trail. The camera captures their focused, cooperative body language as they work in unison, soft ambient tavern lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot, Ren Dawncrest gently guides the floating mana flicker toward the metallic residue on the table. Ren Brightford carefully uses tweezers to lift a shimmering fragment from the residue, placing it into a small glass vial held by the mage. They exchange a nod of professional understanding, the scene illuminated by the soft glow of the mana, consistent identity and camera, no text, no watermark.
